title: Buyer Memory Ledger
problem: AI-native SME M&A depends on remembering buyer preferences, deal structures, and owner constraints without creating a black-box matching process.
direction: A buyer-preference memory and explainability ledger that replays synthetic sell-side mandates against acquirer criteria, explains why buyers were ranked, and detects stale or contradictory buyer memory.
why: DealFlowAgent publicly emphasizes conversational AI matchmaking and memory of buyer preferences. The project turns that claim into an auditable matching artifact Joe can inspect deal by deal.
